title: Calling all app designers! Check out the monday.com UI kit :)
excerpt:
We just released an open-source Figma template that contains a ton of example components for building apps to look like monday! Check it out here: monday.com UI KIt 
You can duplicate it and start using the examples in y…

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
We just released an open-source Figma template that contains a ton of example components for building apps to look like monday! Check it out here: monday.com UI KIt

You can duplicate it and start using the examples in your apps immediately!

image2498×1306 244 KB

posts.author: jackjack2202 (Jack Kubicek)
posts.cookedHtml: @dipro This is music to my ear! Mirroring design.monday.com into figma hasnt been fun for me. Thank you so much!
